garlic-anchovy-sauce-lezzet.name: Garlic Anchovy Sauce
instructions: 1. thoroughly clean and wash the water and drain the water.
2. Cook and cool in a pot.
3. Take the culinary robot along with dough, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice and yeast.
4. Pass through the robot after salt and pepper sprinkle on it.
5. Serve.

garlic-and-herb-marinade.name: Garlic And Herb Marinade
instructions: Combine water, vinegar, oil, garlic, thyme, Italian-style seasoning, poultry seasoning, rosemary, salt, and ground black pepper in a medium bowl; mix well.

garlicky-bacon-and-pickle-pizza.name: Garlicky Bacon And Pickle Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Mix oil and garlic together in a small bowl and brush over pizza crust. Pre-bake crust in the preheated oven for 2 minutes. Remove from oven.
Evenly sprinkle pizza crust with pepper Jack cheese and Cheddar cheese and return to the hot oven. Bake until cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
Evenly distribute crumbled bacon, pickle slices, and crushed red pepper flakes over the crust. Return to the oven and bake for 2 more minutes. Garnish with dill.

gaziantep-style-mixed-stuffed-meat-lezze.name: Gaziantep Style Mixed Stuffed Meat
instructions: 1. Peel the eggplants in salty water.
2. Prepare for eggplants.
3. Remove it to cut a cover through tomatoes.
4. Clean the stem and seeds of peppers.
5. Clean the shell of onion and yellowms and shore.
6. Mix rice, onion, garlic, mink, rice, tomato paste, pepper paste, lemon juice, some water, salt and pepper in a bowl.
7. Share the inside of vegetables and close the mouth parts with the parts you cut.
8. Index with eggplant, pepper and tomato ranking in the pot.
9. Add water until you close a porcelain plate on the grounds and gently pass over.
10. Bake 45 minutes in jealous fire when it starts to boil quickly.
11. 11. Cook the porcelain plate on the grounds for 15 minutes.
12. Serve for 5 minutes in the pot.
12. August You can also browse the recipe of low-calorie and tasty mixed dolma.

geng-dang-muu.name: Geng Dang Muu

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, halved lengthwise, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: . palm sugar or light brown sugar

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably high-sided, over medium-high. Add leek, season lightly with salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until most of it is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl; wipe out skillet.

Pour another 2 Tbsp. oil into same skillet over medium-high. Cook brussels sprouts, in a single layer, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about 3 minutes. Turn over and cook until other side is browned, about 2 minutes. Transfer to bowl with leek.

Wipe out skillet and heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil (still over medium-high). Add curry paste, palm sugar, 2 tsp. fish sauce, and 3 whole lime leaves. Cook, stirring often, until paste darkens slightly, about 1 minute. Add pork and cook, stirring and breaking up, until in small pieces, about 2 minutes (pork doesn’t need to be fully cooked at this point). Pour coconut milk into skillet and reduce heat to medium. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until pork is cooked through and curry thickens slightly, about 5 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat and stir in Thai basil and leek and brussels sprouts. Scatter remaining thinly sliced lime leaf over and serve with rice.

giant-bbq-rib-sandwich-to-feed-a-crowd.name: Giant Bbq Rib Sandwich (to Feed A Crowd)

ingredients.prep: membrane removed (this is essential for de-boning)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150°C).

Lay the ribs on a long sheet of aluminum foil. Combine the paprika, pepper, brown sugar, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, and chili powder in a small bowl, then cover the ribs evenly on both sides, pressing the rub into any cracks and smoothing out any large lumps. Wrap the foil around the ribs, making sure they’re completely sealed. It’s important that the juices of the ribs stay inside the foil to keep the ribs moist during cooking. Use more sheets of foil if necessary.

Bake the ribs for 3-3½ hours, until tender. Unwrap the ribs carefully, then wiggle the bones out slowly. If you’re having trouble removing the bones, use a knife to make small cuts in the meat to aid their removal. Preheat the broiler on your oven.
Combine the barbecue sauce and honey in a small bowl and brush both sides of the deboned slab of ribs generously, being sure to carefully handle the ribs since the meat will be super tender.
Broil the ribs for about 5 minutes until the glaze is bubbling and starting to brown.

Slice the bread loaf in half lengthwise, then butter both sides of the bread. Sprinkle sesame seeds on the outside of the bread, then toast under the broiler for a few minutes. Keep a careful eye on it as they will burn extremely quickly.

With two long spatulas or knives, carefully transfer the glazed ribs to the bottom bread half, then top with the caramelized onions, parsley, and the top half of bread. Cut into about 8 2-inch (5-cm) sandwiches, and serve.
Enjoy!

ginger-dressing.name: Ginger Dressing
instructions: Combine onion, peanut oil, rice vinegar, water, ginger, ketchup, soy sauce, sugar, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper in a blender. Blend until well combined.

ginger-spice-cake-with-dried-cherries.name: Ginger Spice Cake With Dried Cherries

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for pan
Hot espresso or very strong coffee

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter Bundt pan. Dust pan with flour, tapping out excess. Combine cherries, crystallized ginger, grated ginger, and Dijon mustard in a medium bowl. Pour espresso over cherry mixture and set aside. Whisk 2 1/2 cups flour, ground ginger, baking soda, salt, allspice, cinnamon, and pepper in a large bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat 1/2 cup butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add brown sugar and beat for 2 minutes. Beat in eggs one at a time, then beat in molasses.

Strain cherry mixture into a small bowl, reserving soaking liquid. Add dry ingredients to butter mixture in 3 additions, alternately with soaking liquid in 2 additions, beating to blend between additions. Fold in drained cherry mixture. Scrape batter into prepared pan.
Bake until top of cake springs back when lightly pressed in the middle, about 1 hour. Let cool in pan on a wire rack. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Remove cake from pan. Spoon Luscious Chocolate Icing over cake, if using, allowing it to drip down sides. Cut cake into wedges to serve.

gingerbread-snowflakes.name: Gingerbread Snowflakes
instructions: Whisk 2 cups plus 2 tablespoons flour, cocoa powder, ground ginger, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, cloves, black pepper, and cayenne together in a large bowl until thoroughly mixed.

Cream together butter and sugar in a separate bowl with an electric mixer until pale yellow and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add molasses, vanilla, and egg. Whisk mixture until well blended. Add flour mixture to butter mixture and stir just until the flour disappears.

Spread out a piece of plastic wrap on the counter and set dough on top. Wrap dough with plastic wrap while shaping it into a rectangle approximately 1-inch high by 4 to 5 inches wide. Refrigerate until dough is cold and firm, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with a Silpat mat.
After the dough has chilled, slice across the block into 14 or 15 pieces about 3/8 inch thick. Each slice is then cut in half, and each half into 3 strips lengthwise.
Use 3 strips of the dough to form the 6-pointed star as shown and place onto the prepared baking sheet with space in between as they spread out.

Bake in the preheated oven for about 12 minutes if you like the cookies to be chewy, or 15 minutes for crispy cookies. Remove from the oven and wait for 5 minutes before carefully transferring cookies to a wire rack. Allow to cool completely, about 30 minutes.
Mix together the powdered sugar and water until a ribbon is formed. Transfer the icing into a piping bag with a small round tip. Pipe snowflake designs onto the cooled cookies.
Serve and enjoy!

gingerbread-with-flower-cheese-argiro.name: Gingerbread With Flower Cheese
instructions: In a bowl, add the butter and melt with a fork.
Then add the sugar, honey, lemon zest, cinnamon and egg?a.
Mix everything very well until we have a density mixture.
Brush the individual cake form or individual disposable form (approximately 8) with olive oil.
Sprinkle with flower and shake.
We split the mixture into the forms.
Bake the honey pies at 170°C points for 30 minutes until golden.
If you want, sprinkle the hot honey pies with cinnamon sugar or some honey, after removing them warm from the oven.
Serve them immediately in the individual form and enjoy them warm!

gluten-free-biscotti-recipe-lezzet.name: Gluten-free Biscotti Recipe

ingredients.item: Half-water cup grape breaksses or maple syru Tags
Half-water cup is chopped roasted  k
5–6 pcs of small pieces of hollow

instructions: 1. Start the egg and molasses in the mixing container; start by rubbing.
2. Add nuts oil and vanilla and mix until you get a homogeneous mixture.
3. Mix gluten-free flour, almond flour, nuts flour, baking powder and salt in another container.
4. Prepare a soft dough with the help of spatula by adding dry materials into liquid mixture.
5. Add Nuts nuts, dry parts well as bakeries to dough.
6. I mix the gentleman until the materials are eaten. distributed.
7. It allows you to listen to the dough about 10 minutes, make it easier.
8. Cut the dough into two polishes and create long batons on the oily paper-series tray.
9. Ö Bake about 20 minutes in the oven heated 180 degrees.
10. Take the tray from the oven when it starts to lighten and fry.
11. 11. After a little spark, slice about 1–1.5 cm thick.
12. Set the slices into the tray again and give the characteristic spark of biscottiye by baking more than 10–15 minutes.
12. August A fine layer of nuts cream on the veuuml slices of the colded biscotti can suede and you can wealth by sprinkle the hunger nuts.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

goan-chicken-cafreal.name: Goan Chicken Cafreal
instructions: Wash the chicken and cut it into large pieces. Rub with salt and set to aside.
Combine chile peppers, cilantro, garlic, ginger, tamarind, poppy seeds, cumin seeds, cinnamon, cloves, peppercorns, and turmeric in a large mortar. Crush into a paste with a pestle.
Rub chicken with the paste on all sides until completely covered. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, or 8 hours to overnight for best results.

Add enough oil to generously cover the entire bottom of a large skillet; heat until a thermometer registers 177°C (175 degrees C). Fry chicken pieces in batches until golden brown on the outside and no longer pink at the bone, about 15 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Drizzle with lime juice before serving.

golden-milk-nice-cream.name: Golden Milk Nice Cream
instructions: Mix coconut milk, coconut cream, sliced ginger, fresh turmeric, coconut oil, and split vanilla bean in a bowl. Set aside.

Place cinnamon stick, cardamom pods, and peppercorns in a mortar. Grind with a pestle until the cinnamon stick is in pieces and the cardamom pods have opened. Make sure to lightly smash the seeds. Crush the peppercorns slightly.
Add cinnamon mixture to a saucepan over medium-low heat. Stir lightly to help release the natural oils in the spices. Remove from heat.

Pour the coconut milk mixture into the saucepan; make sure it doesn't get too hot. Add honey. Mix well and let sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes. Refrigerate until the mixture is cool but the coconut oil is still liquid, about 10 minutes.

Remove and discard the sliced ginger and cardamom pods from the mixture. Remove the vanilla bean. Scrape the pod for the paste and add it to the milk. Discard the vanilla bean pod. Blend the mixture with an immersion blender until smooth.

Pour coconut milk mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions, about 20 minutes. Add the fresh grated ginger in the last 5 minutes of churning. Transfer to an airtight container and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
Serve with a dusting of ground turmeric and ground cayenne.

gomae-japanese-style-spinach-salad.name: Gomae (japanese-style Spinach Salad)
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil; season generously with salt. Stir in half of frozen spinach and cook, stirring, until warmed through, about 30 seconds. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer spinach to a rimmed baking sheet and spread out in an even layer. Return water to a boil, then repeat process with remaining spinach. Chill spinach at least 30 minutes and up to 3 hours.

Meanwhile, toast sesame seeds in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, shaking skillet occasionally, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, about 4 minutes. Transfer seeds to a plate and let cool slightly. Pour into a resealable plastic bag and seal pressing out air. Using a rolling pin or wine bottle, crush seeds until mostly mashed but with some whole seeds remaining; transfer to a large bowl. Add soy sauce, vinegar, and mirin and whisk to combine.

Working over the sink, grab one small handful of spinach at a time and squeeze out as much water as possible with your hands, then transfer to bowl with dressing. Once all spinach has been added to bowl, toss with your hands, taking care to break up any clumps so that spinach gets well-coated.

gourmet-sweet-potato.name: Gourmet Sweet Potato
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place an oven rack in the center position. Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Bake sweet potatoes in the preheated oven on the center rack until a knife inserted into the centers easily glides through, about 35 minutes. Let cool enough to handle, then peel and mash in a large bowl.
Add eggs, sugar, 1/4 cup butter, heavy cream, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt to mashed potatoes; mix well and transfer to the prepared baking dish.
Combine remaining 1/4 cup butter, brown sugar, pecans, and flour in a medium bowl. Mix with a pastry blender or your fingers to the consistency of course meal. Sprinkle over sweet potato mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is crisp and lightly browned, about 30 minutes.

greek-yogurt-with-spiced-pepita-and-cash.name: Greek Yogurt With Spiced Pepita And Cashew Crunch And Mango
instructions: Top yogurt with mango and Spiced Pepita and Cashew Crunch.

green-charmoula.name: Green Charmoula

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Pulse first 6 ingredients in a blender or food processor until a coarse purée forms. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD: Sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Let come to room temperature before using.

green-lentil-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Green Lentil Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of green lentilization, you can use lunar lentil or salt lentil. The waistuga lentils give a more tok texture and a stylish look.
Köcan be cooked in the oven instead of tomato red pepper, fresh red pepper or villageou can add spoon to the flavor of the drink.
You can use cucumber pickled, beet pickled or light sourness instead of curry.
You can get a more hearty salad by adding boiled fresh corn grains or yellow chickpeas instead of canned corn.
Fresh mint, roka or green onion can be preferred instead of maydanoz and dereotu. This change increases the freshness of the salad.
Carrot you can get different color and texture by using grated pumpkin, purple cabbage or fine ending red onion instead.
You can enrich the aroma of salad using avocado oil or walnut oil instead.
Apple vinegar instead of citrus sour, grape vinegar or orange juice can be used in lighter and different sauce.
Instead of sumak, you can adjust the spice profile of the salad by adding pepper, pepper or Kimyon to your taste.

15. Rest for 10–15 minutes before serving the salad.
16. Then take the service plate and serve at cold or room temperature.

green-meatballs-argiro.name: Green Meatballs

ingredients.item: A little flower that swells itsself
A little flower that swells itsself

instructions: We clear the leads and we only keep the Tender place. Cut into think slides and add them to a large pan with some water to cover them.
We sharpen the leaves until they drink all their fluids. When dried, add olive oil and saute for 2–3 minutes over high heat. Let them cool.
Boil the potatoes with their peel. Clean and melt themm in a large bowl with a fork.
Add the trees, eggs, dill, parsley and salt and pepper. Mix well.
Add flour until the mixture dickens and forms. Cover with membrane and allow it to cool.
We make encounterballs, flour them and add them to a tray.
Heat a large pan with some olive oil over medium to high heat. Fry the Meatballs 2 minutes on each side until golden.
Leave on Absorbent paper. After the first frying, lower the heat to smooth the next doses.

green-pie-for-fasting-argiro.name: Green Pie For Fastin g

ingredients.item: 1 pack village leaf or 6 village homemade leaves
700 gr assorted grasses wild and day
1 pack village leaf or 6 village homemade leaves
700 gr assorted grasses wild and day

instructions: Wash and drag all the grass we use. Day and wild grass, fresh versions and herbs.
Leave the grass in a colander to draw very well.
If you have a centerifuge bowl, drying the salads, dry the grasses and herbs well.
In a pan, with 3 tabletspoons of the total olive oil, add the dry onion and leaves until they become transparent, Always in medium heat.
Let them cool.
Cut all the greens into a large bowl and sprinkle with the kick salt.
Mix and rub them with your hands, so that the volume drops a little and let them stand for 10-15 minutes and with.
Gather with the handfuls, leave behind their liquids that do not need us and place them in a clean bowl.
Add 1/4 cup of total olive oil to the greens.
Rub pepper and add the herbs chopped and the fresh versions with their leaves.
Mix them to oil.
Add the added onions and leads.
Add the semolina (wrinkle, oats flakes, flour or whatever you like) and mix.
These materials suck the wet from the grass and dry the filling.

green-salad-with-yogurt-sauce-argiro.name: Green Salad With Yogurt Sauce
instructions: Wash the vegetarians well (iceberg, lettuce, baby rocket leaves) and drag them.
We cut them nick and put them in a salt box.
Cut the collection into slides and add to the Salad.
Cut the tomatoes in half and add them.
Prepare the dressing: add all the actives into a bowl and whisk until homogenized.
We control and correct functionality and salt.
If you want a thinking composition, add a little water and mix lightly. This will make the result more fluid.
Add the dressing salad, add the crotons and mix gently.

grilled-cheese-and-tomato-stacks.name: Grilled Cheese And Tomato Stacks

ingredients.item: White or whole wheat mini pitas t

instructions: Whisk 1 teaspoon oil, mint, cumin, and pinch of freshly ground black pepper in medium bowl to blend. Add cheese slices; toss to coat. Marinate at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover; chill.

Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Grill pitas until warm and grill marks appear, about 1 minute per side; transfer to serving plate. Grill cheese until grill marks appear and cheese begins to melt, about 1 minute per side. Stack each warm pita with slice of tomato and cheese. Drizzle with oil and sprinkle tomatoes lightly with sea salt.

grilled-chicken-breasts-with-spicy-mango.name: Grilled Chicken Breasts With Spicy Mango Sauce
grilled-chicken-breasts-with-spicy-mango.original_name: Pechugas de pollo a la plancha con salsa de mango picante

ingredients.item: 4  pechugas de pollo  (sin piel ni hueso)
2 cdas de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 / 2 cdite of freshly ground black pepper
1 / 2 cdite of sweet or smoked peppermint
1 big mature handle or 1 ½ cups of cube mango
1 cda apple vinegar or lemon juice
1 cdita de salsa de soya baja en sodio
2 cdas de agua o caldo de pollo

instructions: Limpia bien las pechugas de pollo retirando cualquier exceso de grasa. Seca con papel absorbente.
Farms chicken with salt, pepper, garlic powder, pimenton and lemon juice. Let rest for at least 15 minutes.

While the chicken remains, prepare the sauce. In a food mixer or processor, mix mango into cubes, chili, honey, vinegar, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, water and a pint of salt. Processes to get a thick but homogenous salsa.
Adjust the hot and acidity to taste by adding more chili, honey or lemon juice as best.
Warm an anti-stick plate or frying pan at medium-high heat with a tablespoon of olive oil.
Fitted chicken breasts for 6-8 minutes by the side, or till they are well golden and completely cooked from the inside.
Retira del fuego y deja reposar el pollo 2 minutos antes de cortar.
Serves steamed breasts and widely rinsed with hot mango sauce.
Decora con hojas de cilantro fresco o unas rodajas finas de chile para un toque visual extra.

grilled-chicken-with-lemon-and-thyme.name: Grilled Chicken With Lemon And Thyme
instructions: Prepare a grill for 2-zone heat (for a gas grill, set one burner to medium-high and one or two burners to low; for a charcoal grill, bank most of the coals on one side). Lightly oil grate. Pat chicken breasts dry; season generously all over with salt and pepper. Place on a rimmed baking sheet; let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Thinly slice 1 lemon crosswise into rounds; pluck out seeds. Place half of lemon slices in a small bowl. Add garlic and 1 Tbsp. oil and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper. Set remaining lemon slices aside for serving. Slice remaining lemon in half and squeeze juice into another small bowl (you should have about ¼ cup). Set aside.

Pat chicken dry again (the salt will have drawn out more moisture) and rub with 2 Tbsp. oil. Grill oiled lemon slices over hot side of grill, turning once, until charred in spots, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate. Grill chicken on cooler side of grill, skin side down, until skin is browned and starting to crisp, 15–20 minutes. Turn chicken over, cover, and continue to grill until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breasts registers 160°, 8–10 minutes longer. If desired, uncover grill, move chicken over to hotter side, and lightly char a minute or two. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10–15 minutes.

Pull chicken meat from bones and slice ½" thick. Place on a rimmed platter, shingling slices. Scatter thyme sprigs, olives, grilled lemon slices, and reserved fresh lemon slices over. Season with more salt and pepper; drizzle reserved lemon juice and remaining ½ cup oil over. Let sit at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour before serving.


Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best grilled chicken recipes →

grilled-corn-and-red-cabbage-slaw.name: Grilled Corn And Red Cabbage Slaw
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Cook corn on the preheated grill until charred on all sides, about 15 minutes. Transfer corn to a cutting board; cut kernels from cobs when cool enough to handle.
Meanwhile, combine cilantro, lime, cumin, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl; whisk in olive oil until emulsified.
Add cabbage, corn, and jalapeño to the bowl; toss to coat. Crumble queso fresco over slaw; toss well.

grilled-hearts-of-romaine-with-blue-chee.name: Grilled Hearts Of Romaine With Blue Cheese Vinaigrette And Pickled Onions
instructions: Combine first 5 ingredients and 1/4 teaspoon coarse salt in medium saucepan. Bring to simmer over medium heat. Add onions and stir to blend; return to simmer and cook 2 minutes. Remove from heat; cool to room temperature, about 1 hour. Season with freshly ground black pepper and more salt, if desired. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.
Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Combine vinegar and mustard in bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season with coarse salt and pepper. Mix in 1/2 cup cheese.
Brush cut sides of romaine with olive oil, then sprinkle with coarse salt and pepper. Grill until cut sides are lightly charred, about 2 minutes per side.
Divide grilled romaine among plates. Top with vinaigrette, pickled onions, and blue cheese.

grilled-meatballs-lezzet.name: Grilled Meatballs
instructions: 1. Put bread inner sauce and wipe them in your palm.
2. Peel the garlic and shore.
3. Clean and off Maydanos.
4. Take Restrictions into the kneading container.
5. Uphanized bread interior add porcelain, parsley, salt and drink until 10 minutes.
6. A bit more but than Olive from the ground mixture; load polish preparation round flat meatballs in your hands.
7. Cook in oilless pan or grill.

grilled-pork-chops-with-plum-mostarda.name: Grilled Pork Chops With Plum Mostarda
instructions: Whisk together shallot, vinegar, whole grain mustard, granulated sugar, and Dijon mustard in a medium bowl. Gradually stream in ½ cup oil, whisking vigorously until emulsified. Whisk in oregano and season with salt and pepper. Set vinaigrette aside.
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate. Grill plums, cut side down, until charred and fruit releases easily from grill, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool.

Season pork chops all over with salt and pepper and sprinkle with brown sugar and paprika. Grill, turning occasionally, until deeply browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone registers 140° (internal temperature should climb to 145° as chops rest), 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a platter and let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, cut plum halves into 2 or 3 wedges each and add to reserved vinaigrette; toss gently to coat. Season plum mostarda with salt and pepper.
To serve, toss arugula with some plum mostarda in a large bowl to coat; transfer to plates. Spoon more plum mostarda over pork chops; serve chops with arugula salad alongside.

grilled-pork-chops-with-sweet-lemongrass.name: Grilled Pork Chops With Sweet Lemongrass Marinade

ingredients.prep: each about 12 ounces and 1 inch thick

instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine the sugar, fish sauce, lemongrass, garlic, shallot, chile, and black pepper and whisk until the sugar dissolves. Arrange the pork chops in a rimmed dish in a single layer. Pour the marinade over, cover with plastic wrap, and let marinate at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours. (The pork can also be refrigerated overnight. Bring meat to room temperature before grilling).

2. Prepare a hot fire in a charcoal grill (you should be able to hold your hand 1 to 2 inches above the grate for only 2 to 3 seconds). When the coals are ready, push two-thirds of the coals to one-half of the grill, creating a hot zone; spread the remaining one-third on the opposite side of the grill to create a cooler zone.
3. Remove the pork chops from the marinade and discard the marinade. Place the chops on the hottest part of the grill. Let cook for 1 minute, then flip and cook for 1 minute on the second side.

4. Move the chops to the cooler side of the grill and cook, turning once, for about 10 minutes total, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the chop registers 60°C, raking over coals from the hotter side of the grill if necessary to maintain an even temperature. Spritz any flare-ups with a spray bottle filled with water.

5. Transfer the chops to a large plate, tent with aluminum foil, and let stand for 10 minutes. Cut the meat from the bone and slice the meat across the grain on the diagonal. Transfer the slices and bones to a serving platter and serve.

grilled-salmon-wrapped-in-lemon-and-bay-.name: Grilled Salmon Wrapped In Lemon And Bay Leaves

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced into rounds, divided

instructions: Arrange eight 24-inch-long pieces of kitchen string, side by side and 1 1/2 inches apart, on a clean surface. Overlap bay leaves atop the strings in a rectangle about the same size as the fish. Top the bay leaves with overlapping rows of lemon slices.
Sprinkle the fish skin with coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper; place the fish, skin side down, on the lemon slices.
Sprinkle the fish flesh with coarse salt and pepper; drizzle with olive oil. Top with overlapping rows of lemon slices, then bay leaves.
Tightly tie the strings, securing the lemon slices and bay leaves to the fish.
Place the fish packet in a grilling basket; close the basket (the basket does not have to close completely in order to support the fish).
If preparing ahead, chill the salmon in the basket for up to 2 hours. Bring to room temperature before grilling.
Prepare your barbecue to medium-high heat.

Grill the fish in the basket until just firm to the touch and a thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 57°C, holding the basket sides together to turn the fish. This will take about 20 minutes per side (approximately 40 minutes total).
Transfer the grilled fish to a platter, with the string knots facing up.
Carefully remove the strings, bay leaves, and lemons from the top side of the fish.
Drizzle with additional olive oil; then serve immediately.

grilled-sausage-dinner-ready-for-spaghet.name: Grilled Sausage Dinner: Ready For Spaghetti

ingredients.item: Sam’s choice® italia tomato basil pasta sauce

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the spaghetti and cook until al dente, about 10 minutes.
In a small pot, bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat. Add the zucchini to the sauce and gently heat through, about 5 minutes.
Top the pasta with the sauce, grilled sausage and torn fresh basil.
Enjoy!

grilled-sausage-dinner-sauce-boss.name: Grilled Sausage Dinner: Sauce Boss

ingredients.item: Sam’s choice® italia tomato basil pasta sauce

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the gnocchi and cook until they begin to float, about 3 minutes.
In a small pot, bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat. Add the tomatoes to the sauce and gently heat through, about 5 minutes.
Top the gnocchi with the sauce, grilled sausage and torn fresh basil.
Enjoy!

grilled-sausages-with-figs-and-mixed-gre.name: Grilled Sausages With Figs And Mixed Greens

ingredients.prep: spicy Italian sausages, or garlic sausages

instructions: Prepare grill (medium-high heat). Brush sausages and onions with 3 tablespoons dressing; grill sausages until cooked, 15 minutes, and onions until charred, 10 minutes. Toss greens with remaining dressing; mound on plates. Slice 4 sausages (reserve 2 for pizza). Top greens with sausages, cheese, figs, and mint.

grilled-spicy-pork-meatballs-with-nuoc-c.name: Grilled Spicy Pork Meatballs With Nuoc Cham
instructions: If you’re using wooden skewers, soak in water 30 minutes.
Finely grate ginger and 4 garlic cloves into a medium bowl. Add pork, salt, ½ cup cilantro, ¼ cup chili paste, 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, and 2 tsp. sugar and mix well with your hands to combine.
Form pork mixture into 20 oblong (football-ish) balls. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet or large plate and chill at least 15 minutes and up to 8 hours.

Meanwhile, whisk lime juice and remaining 1 Tbsp. cilantro, 2 tsp. chili paste, 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, 2 tsp. sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until combined. Finely grate remaining garlic clove into nuoc cham and stir to combine.

Prepare a grill for medium heat. Lightly oil grate. Thread 2 balls lengthwise onto 2 skewers, repeating to make 10 skewers with 2 meatballs on each. (Using 2 skewers stabilizes the meatballs so that they won’t spin around when you turn them on the grill.)

Drizzle meatballs with 2 Tbsp. oil. Grill meatballs, turning occasionally, until well charred and just cooked through, 7–9 minutes. Let cool slightly. Remove from skewers and transfer to a platter. Serve nuoc cham alongside.

grilled-squash-with-nuoc-cham-chimichurr.name: Grilled Squash With Nuoc Cham Chimichurri

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Cut each 2½ lb. zucchini and/or other summer squash (about 12 small) in half lengthwise, then score cut sides in a ¼" crosshatch pattern, going as deep as possible without cutting into the skin. Toss squash, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large baking dish or on a rimmed baking sheet. Let sit at least 15 and up to 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, pulse ½ bunch parsley, tough stems removed, 1 shallot, coarsely chopped, 1 garlic clove, 1 jalapeño, coarsely chopped, ¼ cup fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 cup (tightly packed) mint leaves, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a food processor until finely chopped. Scrape into a medium bowl, pour in ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil, and stir to incorporate. Taste chimichurri and season with more salt if needed.

Grill squash, cut sides down, until well charred underneath,
10–15 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let sit until cool enough to handle.
Slice squash crosswise on a diagonal into 3 or 4 pieces.

Spread about ½ cup chimichurri over a platter. Arrange squash on top and drizzle more sauce over. Top with some mint leaves. Serve remaining chimichurri on the side if desired.
Do Ahead: Chimichurri can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Oil will solidify; bring to room temperature before using.

grilled-strip-steak-with-blistered-tomat.name: Grilled Strip Steak With Blistered Tomatoes And Green Beans

ingredients.prep: green beans, and/or haricots verts, trimmed

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Toss beans with 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl; season with salt. Place beans on grill and cook, turning occasionally, until tender and lightly charred, 6–8 minutes.
Meanwhile, place a small skillet on grill; pour in 2 Tbsp. oil. Cook half of tomatoes, shaking skillet occasionally, until beginning to burst, about 3 minutes.

Oil grate. Season steaks with salt and coat with paprika, packing on more if needed. Drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil. Grill steaks until lightly charred and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 49°C, about 4 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before slicing against the grain.

Halve remaining tomatoes and toss with chile, shallot, garlic, vinegar, grilled tomatoes, grilled beans, and 3 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl. Add basil, season with salt, and toss again. Combine steak and tomato mixture on a platter; drizzle with oil.

grillhaxe-grilled-eisbein-pork-shanks.name: Grillhaxe (grilled Eisbein, Pork Shanks)
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Whisk olive oil, marjoram, basil, rosemary, thyme, sea salt, paprika, black pepper, and vegetable bouillon powder together in a bowl. Rub pork shanks with herb rub and arrange on a large baking pan.
Roast in preheated oven until shanks are tender and outer skin is crispy, about 3 hours.

ground-flax-egg-substitute.name: Ground Flax Egg Substitute
instructions: Whisk water and ground flax seeds together in a bowl until combined, about 30 seconds. Let sit until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
Whisk again, about 30 seconds. Let sit until thickened, about 2 minutes more.
